scenario_description: A sequence showing a raw chicken breast being seasoned, cooked in a pan until browned, and finally sliced next to a salad, with bread and cheese visible as uncooked background items throughout.

turns.text: Here's the start. I've got some salt and pepper on it.
turns.image_description: A close-up shot of a single raw chicken breast resting on a white ceramic plate. The meat is pale pink and glistening slightly. Coarse black pepper and white sea salt are sprinkled generously over the top surface. In the blurry background, a loaf of sourdough bread and a block of cheddar cheese sit on a wooden counter.

turns.text: Looks like a good start! That seasoning should give it a nice crust. What's the plan for cooking it?
Just put it in the pan. It's browning nicely now.
turns.image_description: The same chicken breast is now sizzling in a cast-iron skillet. The side facing up has developed a deep golden-brown sear with distinct grill marks from the pan ridges. The edges are curling slightly. The background shows the stovetop burner; the bread and cheese from the previous scene are no longer visible.

turns.text: That color looks perfect. Did you let it rest before moving it?
Yeah, here it is sliced up. Ready to eat with this salad.
turns.image_description: The cooked chicken breast, now fully opaque and white inside, is sliced into thick strips on a green cutting board. Next to the chicken is a small bowl of mixed greens and cherry tomatoes (the salad). To the right of the cutting board, the loaf of sourdough bread and the block of cheddar cheese from the first image are visible again, still whole and uncut.

turns.text: Looks delicious! The contrast between the browned exterior and the white interior is great.
Which item was present in the very first photo and the final photo, but never seen in the middle photo? A) The sliced chicken B) The salad C) The sourdough bread D) The cast-iron pan

ground_truth.reasoning_chain: 1. Turn 1 image shows: Raw chicken, salt/pepper, sourdough bread, cheddar cheese. 2. Turn 3 image shows: Cooked chicken in a cast-iron pan. Bread and cheese are absent. 3. Turn 5 image shows: Sliced chicken, salad, sourdough bread, cheddar cheese. 4. The question asks for an item present in Turn 1 and Turn 5, but missing in Turn 3. 5. Chicken is in all three (raw, cooking, sliced). Salad is only in Turn 5. Pan is only in Turn 3. Bread is in Turn 1 and Turn 5, but missing in Turn 3. Therefore, C is correct.
ground_truth.key_difficulty: The model must track the presence/absence of background objects (bread/cheese) across three distinct visual contexts where the main subject (chicken) changes state. A model focusing only on the main subject or the most recent image would fail to notice the bread's disappearance in the middle turn and reappearance at the end.

_meta.scenario: The sequence shows a raw chicken breast being seasoned, then placed in a pan where it browns, and finally sliced on a cutting board next to a salad. Other items like bread and cheese are visible in the background but remain uncooked.
